name: assistant-plugins
description: Orq plugins for Claude Code — tracing, MCP tools, and agent skills

plugins.name: orq-trace
plugins.description: Automatically trace Claude Code sessions to Orq. Captures sessions, turns, tool calls, and LLM responses as hierarchical OTLP spans.

plugins.name: orq-skills
plugins.description: Agent skills for building, evaluating, and optimizing LLM pipelines on orq.ai. Includes skills for experiment design, prompt optimization, trace analysis, dataset generation, and agent/evaluator creation.

plugins.name: orq-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for interacting with your orq.ai workspace — manage agents, deployments, datasets, experiments, traces, and more.
